title: The Internet Is No Longer Human
summary: Bots now constitute the majority of web traffic, Google AI Overviews reduce user clicks on web links, and AI agents are beginning to browse and transact online autonomously. This represents a fundamental shift in internet architecture from human-driven to machine-driven interactions, with implications for content creators and the traditional web ecosystem.
writeup: The video argues that the web is no longer primarily a human space: bots and AI agents now account for the bulk of traffic and activity. It points to concrete shifts, including Google AI Overviews cutting clicks through to sites, AI agents executing purchases autonomously, and machine requests outnumbering human ones. The framing matters because it reframes who actually uses and controls the web, with implications for web scraping, AI-generated content, and the economics of sites that depend on human visits.
